narrative:
Dayton City has 79,626 registered voters, with 63.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +6.0% D−R vs +26.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
